1.solution:
Onward=d km at 40km/h. Return=(d+10) km: half at 30, half at 50.
Return time=(d+10)(1/60+1/100)=4(d+10)/150. Difference=19/60h.
4(d+10)/150âˆ’d/40=19/60 â†’ multiply 600: 16(d+10)âˆ’15d=190 â†’ d=30.
Return=40 km.
Answer: 40.

2.solution:
A speed=3v, B speed=2v, stream=u. A round trip d: T_A=6dv/(9vÂ²âˆ’uÂ²). B round trip d: T_B=4dv/(4vÂ²âˆ’uÂ²).
T_Bâˆ’T_A=20 ...(I). A round trip 2d=12dv/(9vÂ²âˆ’uÂ²)=T_B+16 ...(II).
From (II)âˆ’(I): 6dv/(9vÂ²âˆ’uÂ²)=36 â†’ T_A=36 min.
Answer: A (36).

3.solution:
Speed ratio R:S=360:240=3:2 (Ram clockwise, covers 600âˆ’240=360 at 1st meeting).
At 3rd meeting: combined=3Ă—600=1800m. Ram covers (3/5)Ă—1800=1080m clockwise.
1080 mod 600=480m clockwise from start.
Answer: 480.

4.solution:
1st meeting at 180m from A. Combined=300 â†’ Ajay:Vijay=180:120=3:2.
2nd meeting: combined=3Ă—300=900m. Ajay covers (3/5)Ă—900=540m.
540m: 300 to B + 240 back â†’ position=300âˆ’240=60m from A.
Answer: A (60m from A).

5.solution:
Train X: 54km/h=15m/s. Cross tree in 24s â†’ length_X=360m.
Platform: (360+p)/15=90 â†’ p=990m.
Train Y: 60km/h=100/6 m/s. (L_Y+990)/(100/6)=72 â†’ L_Y+990=1200 â†’ L_Y=210m.
Answer: 210.

6.solution:
A(90km/h, 9AM) meets C(50km/h, 6AM): 90t=50(t+3) â†’ t=3.75h â†’ 12:45PM, 337.5km.
B needs 337.5/60=5.625h=5h37m30s before 12:45PM â†’ start=7:07:30AM.
Not among options.
Answer: D (None of these).

7.solution:
C beats B by 120m in 720m: B/C=600/720=5/6.
B beats A by 360m in 720m: A/B=360/720=1/2.
When C runs 720m, B runs 600m, A runs 600Ă—(1/2)=300m.
C beats A by 720âˆ’300=420m. Not in options.
Answer: D (None of these).

8.solution:
Still water=15km/h. Upstream: 15km in 1.5h â†’ speed=10km/h. Stream=5km/h.
Downstream=20km/h.
Time for 40km down + 40km up = 40/20+40/10=2+4=6 hours.
Answer: 6.

9.solution:
Chahel catches Aadit: 10t=6(t+15) â†’ t=22.5s (from Chahel's start). Position=225m.
Badal's position at same moment: 8Ă—(22.5+5)=220m. [Badal started 5s before Chahel]
Distance=225âˆ’220=5m.
Answer: B (5).
